title: Penne Nee Illammal Lyrics Bramman Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Song: Penne Nee Illammal
Singer(s): Karthik, M M Manasi
Music: Devi Sri Prasad
Movie: Bramman

Unpechai kettale
manasellam pudhu baashai
pudhu baashai, pudhu baashai,
pudhu baashai, pudhu baashai

Vendaam ena sonna podhum
kangal thaedudhey
kaanam ena nenjam vaadudhey.
Pogum vazhi engum pookkal
sindhi moodudhey
ullam unai mattum naadudhey.

Penne nee illaamal
naan poga paadhai illaye.
Oh oh pene nee illaamal
en vazhakkai muttrupulliye.

Mudhal kadhal endraal
mazhayum veyilum adhil
vaanam vandhu villaai valayum

en ulagam endraal
neeyum naanum adhil
kaalam neram ellaam karaiyum

Thaniyaaga vazhndha kaalam
thaandi pogum neram
thaedi vandaai neeyum podhaadhaa!

Ada nettru nalla thookkam
indru yeno yekkam
kadhal seiyyum kaayam aaraadhaa?

Penne nee illaamal
naan poga paadhai illaye.
Oh oh pene nee illaamal
en vazhakkai muttrupulliye.

Naan kannai thirakkira neram
edhire dhinam unnai
paarkkanum mudhalil uyire.

En kangal urangidum munne
adhile dhinam kanavaai
nulaivadhu needhaan uyire.

Unnai ullangaiyil vaiththu
regai pole thaithu
thaanga pogum naalai thandhaaye.

Kedigaaram mullaai naanum
unnai suttra vendum
neram nirkka vendum angaeye.

Penne nee illaamal
naan poga paadhai illaye.
Oh oh pene nee illaamal
en vazhakkai muttrupulliye.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

Penne Nee Illammal expresses deep romantic feelings and the beauty of love, highlighting emotional connections.

What is the context of the song in the movie?

The song plays during a pivotal romantic moment in Bramman, enhancing the emotional depth of the characters' relationship.

Who are the artists involved in this song?

The song features the talented singer Manasi MM and is composed by Devi Sri Prasad.

When was the song released?

Penne Nee Illammal was released on February 10, 2014.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Penne Nee Illammal, the romantic essence of love is beautifully portrayed through heartfelt lyrics and soothing melodies. The song captures the emotions of longing and affection, resonating deeply with listeners. Set against the backdrop of Bramman, it enhances the romantic narrative of the film. The collaboration between Manasi MM's vocals and Devi Sri Prasad's music creates a captivating experience that lingers in the heart.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Penne Nee Illammal from Bramman is a mesmerizing romantic duet that beautifully captures the essence of love. With the enchanting vocals of Manasi MM and the captivating music by Devi Sri Prasad, this song creates an unforgettable atmosphere. Dive into the lyrical magic that resonates with every heartbeat and evokes deep emotions.
stanzaMeanings: When I see your eyes, my heart feels a sweet sensation, sweet sensation, sweet sensation, sweet sensation, sweet sensation.
When I hear your voice, my heart speaks a new language, a new language, a new language, a new language, a new language.
If you say you don't want me, my eyes will search for you, my heart will cry. The way forward is filled with flowers, but my heart only calls for you.
Without you, I have no path to walk. Oh, without you, my life is like a barren land.
If love begins, it brings both rain and sunshine, and the sky comes down to play.
If my world is you and me, then time and moments will always be together.
The time spent alone will pass, and you will come searching for me, won't you?
Oh, yesterday was a good sleep, but today feels like a struggle to love, isn't it?
Without you, I have no path to walk. Oh, without you, my life is like a barren land.
When I open my eyes, I want to see you every day, my life from the beginning.
Before my eyes close, every day I dream of you, my life.
You have placed me in your heart, and like a flower, I will bloom and fade away tomorrow.
I need to stay close to you, like a thorny flower, I need to be there.
Without you, I have no path to walk. Oh, without you, my life is like a barren land.
